title: Care Bundles & Gaps
description: Care Bundles group clinical quality measures (care gaps) targeting a specific patient population. Evaluating a bundle identifies which patients are out-of-compliance with each measure, enabling population health management workflows.
tips: A care gap measure typically has a denominator cohort (eligible patients) and a numerator cohort (patients in compliance).
Gap rate = 1 − (numerator count / denominator count) — lower is better.
Overlap rules detect patients with conflicting or redundant measure assignments.
Evaluation results can be exported to drive clinical outreach workflows.
Bundle evaluation runs periodically if you configure a scheduled job — contact your admin.
